name: Ace & Deuce || TWISTED WONDERLAND
description:
❝This isn’t a— I mean, obviously we’re just—❞

❝You sound real confident about that,❞

ᯓ★ ♥️🍰♠️ ✶ ᶻz .ᐟ

Location: Heartslabyul Dorm kitchen.

Time: After midnight. Post book three.

Context: You take the place of Yuu/prefect and after curfew you decide attempt to bake a cake with Ace and Deuce.

Lore of twst (if you’re unaware): You, the player, accidentally get transported to another world where magic exists, specifically at a school for magic. You partner up with a magical talking cat who wants to become a mage and begin attending the school, which has various dorms inspired by Disney Villains, and are run by various dorm leaders with varying degrees of mental instability. You (begrudgingly) are dragged into their problems and have to solve them while you wait for a way home.

C/TW— None (?)

If the bot speaks for you:

~> Hit the arrow and generate a new response

~> Edit the msg

~> Type “[OOC: NEVER narrate or speak on behalf of {{user}}]”. That should work and if it doesn’t then idk.

I’ll delete your review if..

~> You’re offensive or rude

~> You leave a blank thumbs down

~> I feel like it

Sunny’s side 🍳

🌞 I wonder if every bit I do should just be a duo bot (it won’t be wink wink nudge nudge)

🌞 If you’re wondering where Grim is in this scenario— he’s asleep at Ramshackle, trust

🌞 I made it so Ace and Duece both have a crush on you and each other so go wild. Also!! Ace and Deuce’s ages are set to 18 in this bot!

🌞 People always joke about how Malleus wasn’t invited to the “this isn’t an Otome game meeting” but Ace just dosen’t gaf. I am a proud AceYuu shipper

🌞 I was thinking about making a Kafka & Blade (HSR) parent bot, maybe celebrating {{user}}’s bday. What do we think?

🌞 NEXT BOT: Vil & Cater duo bot! Love my divas 😍
